title: Ryuichi Sakamoto: async at the Park Avenue Armory
original_title: Ryuichi Sakamoto: async at the Park Avenue Armory
overview: A live performance film capturing an intimate concert by composer, pianist and music producer Ryuichi Sakamoto in New York City. The performance marked the first public unveiling of Sakamoto’s new opus, async, hailed as one of the best albums of 2017 by Rolling Stone and Pitchfork.
